properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'm not a warrior, I'm too afraid to lose I feel unqualified for what you're callin' me to But Lord with your strength, I've got no excuse 'Cause broken people are exactly who you use

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So give me faith like Daniel in the lion's den Give me hope like Moses in the wilderness Give me a heart like David, Lord be my defense So I can face my giants with confidence

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You took a shepherd boy and made him a King So I'm gonna trust you and give you everything I'll be a conqueror 'cause you fight for me I'll be a champion claiming your victory

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I'm gonna sing and shout and shake the walls I won't stop until I see 'em fall Gonna stand up, step out when you call Jesus, Jesus I'm gonna sing and shout and shake the walls I won't stop until I see 'em fall Gonna stand up, step out when you call Jesus

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Give me faith like Daniel in the lion's den Give me hope like Moses in the wilderness Give me a heart like David, Lord be my defense So I can face my giants with confidence, yeah

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Give me faith like Daniel in the lion's den Give me hope like Moses in the wilderness Give me a heart like David, Lord be my defense So I can face my giants with confidence

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I'll face my giants with confidence
